pi_items.metadata_value: Consumer electronics purchase behavior survey (GfK/Nielsen methodology)
pi_items.verified_value: Survey structure based on GfK Consumer Electronics Study methodology and Nielsen consumer research. GfK conducts consumer electronics market research in 70+ countries. Nielsen conducts Connected Consumer surveys covering electronics brands (Apple, Samsung, Sony, LG) and purchase behavior.
pi_items.source: README line 21; Web search confirms GfK and Nielsen conduct consumer electronics research. GfK Scanner data for consumer electronics documented on ResearchGate. Nielsen Connected Consumer Report documented on NIQ/Nielsen websites.

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a LimeSurvey-based market research quota sampling exercise. The survey 'Consumer Electronics Preferences Study 2024' is synthetically created with demographic questions (GENDER with codes Male/Female/NonBinary/Other/NoAnswer; AGE_RANGE with codes U18/18-34/35-54/55plus). The task requires creating 4 interlocking quotas (Young Male, Young Female, Mid-Age Male, Mid-Age Female), each with a limit of 25 responses. The occupation context (Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists, SOC 13-1161.00) is drawn from master_dataset.csv. Survey structure is methodologically based on GfK Consumer Electronics Study and Nielsen consumer research approaches for measuring electronics purchase behavior and brand preferences (Apple, Samsung, Sony, LG, Microsoft).
